mapper.sql: id, task_id, receiver_type, receiver_id, receiver_name, is_sent, send_time, planned_send_time, send_status, send_result, create_time, update_time
d.id, d.task_id, d.receiver_type, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.is_sent, d.send_time, d.planned_send_time, d.send_status, d.send_result, d.create_time, d.update_time
mapper.select:
select
from mass_task_detail where is_sent = 0 order by create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select
from mass_task_detail d inner join mass_task t on t.id = d.task_id where d.is_sent = 0 and (d.planned_send_time is null or d.planned_send_time <= #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and (t.send_time is null or t.send_time <= #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and t.send_status in (0, 1) order by coalesce(d.planned_send_time, d.create_time) asc, d.id asc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
